definitions: A competition, especially one for vintage cars or other vehicles, in which they are judged on their condition, originality, and historical accuracy.
A public competition or exhibition of works of art, musical performances, or other skills.
A gathering or assembly of people, especially for a specific purpose.
examples: The annual concours d'Elegance attracts collectors from around the world.
She won first prize at the piano concours.
A concours of experts debated the new policy.
